name: No intel — worst case
subtitle: Apply when you have no S2 brief
description: Conservative defensive assumption: a peer SIGINT/DF threat exists at typical engagement ranges in every cardinal sector. Use this posture when you have no specific intelligence on what's looking at you. Drops 4 generic threat templates around your current position.

threats.note: Vehicular DF battery to your N — assume worst case until proven otherwise
Second vehicular DF echeloned to your S
Forward observation post DF E of you
Airborne SIGINT orbit W of you (20+ km altitude)
